nodes.name: 杜鹃科
nodes.summary: 杜鹃科（Cuculidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联147种鸟类，如圭拉鹃、Greater ani、滑嘴犀鵑等147种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 小棕鹃属
nodes.summary: 小棕鹃属（Coccycua）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Little cuckoo、Dwarf cuckoo、Ash-colored cuckoo。

nodes.name: Ash-colored cuckoo
nodes.summary: The ash-colored cuckoo (Coccycua cinerea) is an American bird species of the cuckoo family (Cuculidae). It was formerly placed in the genus Coccyzus or Micrococcyx. Following the discovery that it belongs to a distinct lineage around the little cuckoo, the genus Coccycua has been reinstated for these. Its range extends from northern and central Argentina to Uruguay and São Paulo (state); its wintering range extend northwards towards Amazonas. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forest and subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest. References

nodes.name: LC
